creator: hirner@bitfire.at
text:
When trying to compile graphics/jbig2dec (as a dependency of ImageMagick), I got an error message (see PR ports/187959).

The error message told me "Please report to jbig2-dev@ghostscript.com", but when trying so, I got back this message from my mail server:

<jbig2-dev@ghostscript.com>: host mail.ghostscript.com[184.73.189.105] said:
    550 5.1.1 <jbig2-dev@ghostscript.com>: Recipient address rejected: User
    unknown in local recipient table (in reply to RCPT TO command)
